summary: Hive is the second  in Slay the Spire 2.
wikitext:
'''Hive''' is the second {{2|Acts|Act}} in [[Slay the Spire 2:Main|Slay the Spire 2]]. == Overview == Hive is the second act of the game. The act spans 14 rooms, with the first 2 encounters drawn from a pool of weaker enemies. == Events == === Exclusive Events === * {{E|Amalgamator|2}} * {{E|Bugslayer|2}} * {{E|Colorful Philosophers|2}} * {{E|Colossal Flower|2}} * {{E|Doll Room|2}} * {{E|Field of Man-Sized Holes|2}} * {{E|Infested Automaton|2}} * {{E|Spirit Grafter|2}} * {{E|Stone of All Time|2}} * {{E|Tea Master|2}} * {{E|The Lantern Key|2}} * {{E|The Lost Wisp|2}} * {{E|Welcome to Wongo's|2}} * {{E|Zen Weaver|2}} === Shared Events === * {{E|Brain Leech|2}} * {{E|Crystal Sphere|2}} * {{E|Potion Courier|2}} * {{E|Room Full of Cheese|2}} * {{E|Self-Help Book|2}} * {{E|Slippery Bridge|2}} * {{E|Symbiote|2}} * {{E|The Future of Potions?|2}} * {{E|This or That?|2}} == Monsters == The following monsters debut in the Hive:

=== First 2 Encounters === The first 2 encounters are drawn from a pool of weaker enemies. 2 of the 4 possible encounters are selected each run, each with equal probability. {| class="wikitable" ! style="width: 250px;" | Encounter ! style="width: 550px;" | Details |- | [[File:Bowlbug (Rock) Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Bowlbugs#Bowlbug (Rock)]][[File:Bowlbug (Egg or Nectar) Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Bowlbugs]] | 1 {{2|Bowlbugs#Bowlbug (Rock)|Bowlbug (Rock)}} + 1 random worker ({{2|Bowlbugs#Bowlbug (Egg)|Bowlbug (Egg)}} or {{2|Bowlbugs#Bowlbug (Nectar)|Bowlbug (Nectar)}}). |- | [[File:Exoskeleton Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Exoskeleton]][[File:Exoskeleton Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Exoskeleton]][[File:Exoskeleton Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Exoskeleton]] | 3 {{2|Exoskeleton}}s. |- | [[File:Thieving Hopper Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Thieving Hopper]] | A single {{2|Thieving Hopper}}. |- | [[File:Tunneler Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Tunneler]] | A single {{2|Tunneler}}. |} === Remaining Encounters === After the first 2 encounters, the remaining monster fights are drawn from the normal pool with equal probability. {| class="wikitable" ! style="width: 250px;" | Encounter ! style="width: 550px;" | Details |- | [[File:Bowlbug (Rock) Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Bowlbugs#Bowlbug (Rock)]][[File:Bowlbug (Lesser) Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Bowlbugs]][[File:Bowlbug (Lesser) Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Bowlbugs]] | 1 {{2|Bowlbugs#Bowlbug (Rock)|Bowlbug (Rock)}} + 2 random workers from {{2|Bowlbugs#Bowlbug (Egg)|Bowlbug (Egg)}}, {{2|Bowlbugs#Bowlbug (Silk)|Bowlbug (Silk)}}, and {{2|Bowlbugs#Bowlbug (Nectar)|Bowlbug (Nectar)}} (max 1 of each type). |- | [[File:Chomper Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Chomper]][[File:Chomper Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Chomper]] | 2 {{2|Chomper}}s. |- | [[File:Exoskeleton Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Exoskeleton]][[File:Exoskeleton Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Exoskeleton]][[File:Exoskeleton Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Exoskeleton]][[File:Exoskeleton Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Exoskeleton]] | 4 {{2|Exoskeleton}}s. |- | [[File:Hunter Killer Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Hunter Killer]] | A single {{2|Hunter Killer}}. |- | [[File:Louse Progenitor Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Louse Progenitor]] | A single {{2|Louse Progenitor}}. |- | [[File:Myte Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Myte]][[File:Myte Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Myte]] | 2 {{2|Myte}}s. |- | [[File:Ovicopter {{2|Ovicopter}} (can summon [[Slay_the_Spire_2:Ovicopter#Tough Egg|Tough Egg]]s during combat). |- | [[File:Bowlbug (Rock) Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Bowlbugs#Bowlbug (Rock)]][[File:Bowlbug (Silk) Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Bowlbugs#Bowlbug (Silk)]][[File:Slumbering Beetle Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Slumbering Beetle]] | 1 Toad]] | A single {{2|Spiny Toad}}. |- | [[File:The Obscura Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:The Obscura]][[File:Summon Divider Icon.png]][[File:Parafright Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Slay_the_Spire_2:The Obscura#Parafright]] | A single {{2|The Obscura}} (summons a [[Slay_the_Spire_2:The Obscura#Parafright|Parafright]] during combat). |} == Version History == * '''Early Access v0.103.0 (BETA)''' ** Removed the '''Tunneler''' normal encounter. * '''Early Access v0.100.0 (BETA)''' ** Changed the '''Tunneler''' normal encounter: the '''Bowlbug''' is now replaced by a '''Chomper''' that gives Dazed status cards on turn 1 * '''Early Access v0.98''' ** Added Hive to the game.
